title: Kohautia cicendioides

Kohautia cicendioides is further classified within the genus Kohautia, a group of flowering plants native to Southern Africa. uses: Kohautia cicendioides, a plant species native to South Africa, has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties.
